name: vn-cha-ca-la-vong
input: chả cá Lã Vọng with turmeric fish, dill, peanuts, and rice noodles
notes: Hanoi turmeric-fried fish (cá lăng) with dill + crushed peanuts + rice vermicelli. USDA pangasius/catfish ~150 kcal/100g + bún ~110 kcal/100g + 15g peanuts ~85 kcal. Advisory tier — ground truth varies by fish species (cá lăng vs swai).
